_comment: Source of truth for framework and plugin migration versions. Written by install_plugin.sh (plugin section) and updated manually by framework developers (framework section). Never hardcode this data in version.py.

framework_migrations.description: Initial schema — users, guilds, permissions, audit log, LLM tracking, app config
Guild isolation — PostgreSQL Row-Level Security on all guild-scoped tables
Migration history — audit trail of every schema upgrade (who, when, duration, result)
Instrumentation — card_usage, guild_events, request_metrics, bot_command_metrics tables; app_config table for dynamic runtime configuration
Fix RLS policies — guard NULLIF empty-string cast to bigint, bypass check first
